record.field:
ProjectTask = env['project.task'] ProjectTag = env['project.tags']
# Get references stage_1 = env.ref('accounting_firm.project_task_type_1') stage_2 = env.ref('accounting_firm.project_task_type_2') stage_3 = env.ref('accounting_firm.project_task_type_3') admin_user = env.ref('base.user_admin')
today = datetime.datetime.today() now = datetime.datetime.now()
# Month and quarter mapping MONTH_TAGS = { 'january': 1, 'february': 2, 'march': 3, 'april': 4, 'may': 5, 'june': 6, 'july': 7, 'august': 8, 'september': 9, 'october': 10, 'november': 11, 'december': 12 } QUARTER_STARTS = { 'q1': 1, 'q2': 4, 'q3': 7, 'q4': 10 }
# Get all relevant tasks project_tasks = ProjectTask.search([ ('sale_line_id', '!=', False), ('stage_id', '=', stage_1.id), ('project_id.reinvoiced_sale_order_id', 'in', [env.ref('sale_order_1'), env.ref('sale_order_2')]) ])
# Move tasks to stage 2 if they have current month or quarter tag month_name = today.strftime('%B').lower() quarter = f"q{((today.month - 1) // 3 + 1)}".lower()
month_tag = ProjectTag.search([('name', 'ilike', month_name)], limit=1) quarter_tag = ProjectTag.search([('name', 'ilike', quarter)], limit=1)
if month_tag: project_tasks.filtered(lambda t: month_tag in t.tag_ids).write({'stage_id': stage_2.id})
if quarter_tag: project_tasks.filtered(lambda t: quarter_tag in t.tag_ids).write({'stage_id': stage_2.id})
# Assign admin user project_tasks.write({'user_ids': [admin_user.id]})
# Move customer onboarding tasks to stage 3 onboarding_tasks = project_tasks.filtered(lambda t: 'customer onboarding' in (t.name or '').lower()) onboarding_tasks.write({'stage_id': stage_3.id}) for task in onboarding_tasks: desc = str(task.description or '') desc = desc.replace('<li>', '<li class="o_checked">') task.write({'description': desc})
# Templates template_monthly = [ env.ref('accounting_firm.sale_order_template_1'), env.ref('accounting_firm.sale_order_template_4') ] template_quarterly = [ env.ref('accounting_firm.sale_order_template_2'), env.ref('accounting_firm.sale_order_template_5') ] template_yearly = [ env.ref('accounting_firm.sale_order_template_3'), env.ref('accounting_firm.sale_order_template_6') ] template_ubo = [ env.ref('accounting_firm.sale_order_template_7') ]
# Compute next month if today.month == 12: next_month = 1 next_month_year = today.year + 1 else: next_month = today.month + 1 next_month_year = today.year
# Handle deadlines for task in project_tasks: tag_names = [tag.name.lower() for tag in task.tag_ids] deadline = None
# Monthly tag logic matched_months = [month_num for name, month_num in MONTH_TAGS.items() if name in tag_names] if matched_months: month_num = matched_months[0] year = today.year if month_num < next_month: year += 1 deadline = datetime.datetime(year, month_num, 20, 23, 55)
# Quarterly tag logic if not deadline: matched_quarters = [start_month for quarter_name, start_month in QUARTER_STARTS.items() if quarter_name in tag_names] if matched_quarters: start_month = matched_quarters[0] year = today.year if start_month < next_month: year += 1 deadline = datetime.datetime(year, start_month, 25, 23, 55)
# Yearly task logic if not deadline and task.sale_line_id.order_id.sale_order_template_id in template_yearly: year = today.year deadline = datetime.datetime(year, 10, 20, 23, 55) if today >= deadline: deadline = datetime.datetime(year + 1, 10, 20, 23, 55)
# UBO task logic if not deadline and task.sale_line_id.order_id.sale_order_template_id in template_ubo: create_date_str = env['ir.config_parameter'].sudo().get_param('database.create_date') try: db_create_date = datetime.datetime.strptime(create_date_str, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") except: db_create_date = now deadline = db_create_date + datetime.timedelta(days=30) deadline = deadline.replace(hour=23, minute=55)
# Template fallback logic if not deadline: template = task.sale_line_id.order_id.sale_order_template_id if template in template_monthly: deadline = datetime.datetime(next_month_year, next_month, 20, 23, 55) elif template in template_quarterly: deadline = datetime.datetime(next_month_year, next_month, 25, 23, 55)
if deadline: task.write({'date_deadline': deadline})
